summary_en: 2,000,000 shares (1.3% of shares outstanding) | ¥3,000M upper limit | Open-market purchase window 18 May 2026 to 31 Aug 2026 | Stated rationale: shareholder profit return and capital efficiency improvement
title_en: Notice of Resolution on Treasury Share Acquisition (Acquisition of Treasury Shares Based on Articles of Incorporation under Company Law Article 165, Paragraph 2)
translation_en_brief: The San-in Godo Bank resolved on 15 May 2026 to acquire treasury shares under the Company Law. The board authorized acquisition of up to 2,000,000 ordinary shares (1.3% of issued shares excluding treasury stock) for an upper limit of ¥3,000 million via open-market purchase on the Tokyo Stock Exchange from 18 May 2026 through 31 August 2026. The stated purpose is to enhance shareholder returns and improve capital efficiency, thereby raising the bank's enterprise value. As of 31 March 2026, the bank held 5,154,057 treasury shares against 151,823,415 issued shares outstanding (excluding treasury holdings).
